'''Gort''' was a [[Houk/Legends|Houk]]<ref name="Republic72" /> [[Gender/Legends|male]] who, during the height of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], frequented [[Maggot's Cantina]], located in the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Anzat/Legends|Anzat]]'s<ref name="CSWE" /> [[Anzat Spaceport|spaceport]].

Gort was at Maggot's Cantina when [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Aayla Secura/Legends|Aayla Secura]] was looking for [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Sora Bulq/Legends|Sora Bulq]] on that [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. He said he had seen the [[Weequay/Legends|Weequay]] and told her where she could find him.

==Behind the scenes==
Gort first appeared in the comic [[Republic 72|''Republic'' 72]], written by [[John Ostrander]], drawn by [[Jan Duursema]]<ref name="Republic72" /> and released on [[December 24]], [[2004]].<ref name="Marvel">{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/54520/star_wars_republic_2002_72|text=Star Wars: Republic (2002) #72}}</ref> In Gort's entry in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', a [[2008]] reference book written by [[Pablo Hidalgo]] and [[Stephen J. Sansweet]], he is misidentified as a member of the [[Besalisk/Legends|Besalisk]] [[Species/Legends|species]].<ref name="CSWE" />
